request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people support strategic autonomy, but let's be real - we're already seeing how this plays out. Our allies are starting to question our commitment when we push for independence in defense. Remember the last time we had a crisis? It was our partnerships that saved us, not going it alone. We can't afford to weaken those bonds just to prove a point. #NationalSecurity #AllianceStrong
